name: dataforseo
description: DataForSEO MCP server — real-time keyword research, SERP data, backlinks, on-page analysis, and more.

dataforseo_username.description: DataForSEO account email (the login you use at dataforseo.com). Stored securely in your system keychain.

dataforseo_password.description: DataForSEO API password (from the API Access tab in your DataForSEO dashboard). Stored securely in your system keychain.
